steps.title: Attach the modifier
steps.content: The first clause says Okie-Tex takes place in an area with low light pollution. The blank should introduce a supplementary modifier explaining the result of that location: dark skies and good stargazing.

steps.title: Avoid extra finite clauses
steps.content: B and D add a subject plus finite verb after a comma, creating a comma splice. C gives a finite verb without a subject, so the sentence is incomplete after the comma. The answer is A.
